leakage_checks_note: No lookahead/leakage checks were run because no features were computed and no model was trained. There is nothing to check for leakage; the stop occurred before any data consumption.

provenance_gap.root_cause: No committed, reviewed ML Step 4 execution harness on master implements the exact PR #407 contract. Without it, the F-5 provenance chain (PR #407 section 7) cannot be satisfied: the config/feature/model hashes and the deterministic reproducibility guarantee must originate from reviewed code, which does not exist. Authoring a novel unreviewed pipeline and self-certifying its provenance in a single autonomous run would not satisfy the 'complete provenance per PR #407 section 7' requirement, nor the PR #408 'run exactly the contract or stop' mandate.

note: Checksum re-verification (separate report) PASSED for all 20 files; data integrity is not the issue. The issue is the absence of a reviewed, provenance-complete execution pipeline required to run and attest the contract.
